# Pyongyang Poster — parody theme (IAP)

> Mass-games maximalism for cat passwords: a heroic sunrise, a rosy-cheeked
> tabby waving, and a mosaic crowd that spells out MEOW.

An affectionate, **purely visual** send-up of mid-century socialist-realist
*poster and mosaic art* — the bright, optimistic, sunrise-and-flowers graphic
style. Cosmetic only: no leaders, no politics, no slogans — just the cheerful
poster-paint look. Read [`README.md`](README.md) for the token contract.

---

## Philosophy

This is the sunniest theme in the pack. Socialist-realist poster art, stripped of
everything but its *graphic joy*: an enormous idealized sunrise with radiating
beams, saturated flat poster-paint color, rosy-cheeked heroic figures gazing
brightly toward tomorrow, and a "mass games" mosaic — a stadium card-stunt crowd
where thousands of little tiles resolve into one big picture. Pyongyang Poster
points all of that at a beaming cartoon cat: paw raised in a friendly wave,
holding a bouquet of keys, standing in front of a sunburst while a tile-mosaic
audience spells out "ミャオ".

Where Shōwa is a TV studio and Spy is a cold open, this is a **festival**. It's
the most saturated, most symmetrical, most unabashedly triumphant look — pink
skies, gold rays, poppy-red banners, everyone smiling. Kept firmly in cartoon
territory so it reads as warm pastiche, not statement.

Bright, symmetrical, relentlessly optimistic.

---

## Principles

1. **Sunrise is the hero.** A big radiant sun with gold beams anchors the composition.
2. **Poster paint, flat and saturated.** Bright opaque fills; no gradients except the era's airbrushed sky glow (allowed, soft).
3. **Symmetry and uplift.** Centered, rising diagonals, everything reaching upward.
4. **The mosaic crowd.** A grid of tiles that resolves into an image or spells a word.
5. **Rosy cheeks and a wave.** The hero cat beams; warmth over menace.
6. **The bouquet stamp is the seal.** A flower-burst rosette approval mark.

---

## Color — the festival palette

Poster paint: bright, opaque, celebratory. The one theme that permits a soft sky
airbrush (period-accurate), but keep everything else dead flat.

| Role | Name | Hex | Usage |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Floor** (dominant) | Dawn Rose | `#F6D0CE` | Sky/backgrounds — the optimistic rosy dawn. ~50%. |
| **Command** | Poppy Red | `#D5203A` | Banners, the CTA, headline plates. The triumphant shout. ~22%. |
| **Celebrate** | Sunrise Gold | `#F3B21B` | The sun and its beams, medals, sparkles. Generous here. |
| **Cool** (single accent) | Festival Sky | `#3F86C4` | One clear-blue note — the upper sky, ribbons. |
| **Bind** | Poster Ink | `#211A1C` | Outlines, the heroic caption, hard shadows. |
| **Seal** | Rosette Red | `#BE1B32` | The bouquet/flower-burst approval rosette. |

**Rules** — dawn rose 50 · poppy 22 · gold 18 · sky 8 · ink binds. Flat opaque
poster fills everywhere; the *only* permitted softness is a gentle radial sky
glow behind the sun. No digital gloss, no neon.

---

## Type

- **The Shout** — a **bold heroic slab / grotesque**, ALL-CAPS, slightly arched
  (banner-on-a-ribbon curve), poppy-red on cream or gold. Triumphant.
- **The Chyron** — a bright festival ticker. Keep the house katakana front and
  center — `ミャオ・パスワード・だいせいこう` ("Meow Password — great success") —
  cheerful, celebratory, meaningless-triumphant. No real slogans.
- **The Whisper** — friendly stats as "achievements": `スコア 8.8 · きろく こうしん`.
- Latin + katakana share billing; both beaming.

---

## Materials & motifs

- **Radiant sunrise.** A centered sun with long gold beams filling the sky —
  the signature backdrop.
- **Mosaic crowd (card stunt).** A grid of small tiles that resolves into the
  hero cat or spells "ミャオ" — the mass-games showpiece; great for loading/score screens.
- **Bouquet rosette seal.** A flower-burst rosette (replaces the hanko),
  "だいせいこう · MEOW SUCCESS," tilted ~8°.
- **Waving hero cat.** Rosy cheeks, paw raised in a friendly wave, holding a
  bouquet of keys, mid-stride toward the sun.
- **Ribboned banners.** Curved poppy-red ribbon banners with gold fringe.
- **Doves & flowers.** Small peace-doves and blossoms as festival confetti.

---

## Layout, rotation & rhythm

- **Rising, centered composition:** sun high-center, beams fanning out, hero
  cat striding up a gentle diagonal, a ribbon banner arcing across the top.
- **Rotation:** banners curve rather than tilt; the rosette ~8°; panels stay near-level.
- **Repetition:** the mosaic grid, rows of gold beams, a fan of little doves.

## Do / Don't

**Do** — lead with the sunrise; saturated flat poster paint; a beaming, waving
cat; the mosaic-crowd showpiece; keep it warm and festival-bright. **Don't**
— depict any real person, leader, flag, emblem, or slogan; make any text mean
something political (keep it cheerful nonsense); use neon or digital gloss.
It parodies an *art style's optimism*, nothing more.

## Token mapping

| Contract role | Value |
|---|---|
| Floor | Dawn Rose `#F6D0CE` |
| Command | Poppy Red `#D5203A` |
| Celebrate | Sunrise Gold `#F3B21B` |
| Cool | Festival Sky `#3F86C4` |
| Bind | Poster Ink `#211A1C` |
| Seal | Bouquet rosette, "だいせいこう · MEOW SUCCESS" |
| Background motif | Radiant sunrise + gold beams + soft sky glow (the one allowed softness) |
| Frame treatment | Ink border + hard shadow; curved poppy ribbon banners; centered/rising layout |
| Signature stamp | Flower-burst rosette (replaces the hanko) |
| Chyron script | Katakana festival ticker (cheerful nonsense) + Latin |
